data.title: Pringles Parent Kellanova Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates, Despite Sluggish Sales In North America And Europe
data.description: Kellanova beats Q4 earnings estimates with strong organic growth, despite sales declines in North America, Europe, and Latin America.

data.title: XPO Boasts Q4 Margin Expansion, Eyes Freight Market Recovery
data.description: XPO generated $189 million of operating cash flow in the quarter and ended the quarter with $246 million of cash and cash equivalents on hand.

data.title: Tangem Secures US Patent For Seedless Crypto Wallet Backup Technology
data.description: Tangem receives patent for private key backup technology, eliminating need for seed phrases in crypto wallets. Enhances security and accessibility.

data.title: Schwab Expands Active Fixed Income Lineup With New Core Bond ETF
data.description: Schwab Asset Management launches low-cost Core Bond ETF, providing exposure to U.S. dollar debt securities and flexibility for uncertain times.

data.title: Blockchain decentralization: How it ensures fair and tamper-proof trades
